title: forsteronia amblybasis subsp. amblybasis
intro: Forsteronia amblybasis subsp. amblybasis, also known as 'Guayusa', is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Menispermaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are believed to include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight loss. In herbal preparations, Forsteronia amblybasis subsp. amblybasis is often brewed as a tea, or used in combination with other plants to create medicinal infusions.
